playbook.intent: Red status -> three consecutive green weekly reports + signed remediation acceptance from sponsor.
playbook.scope: A project has been flagged red by the client or steerco. This playbook is the 90-day sequence the PM runs: diagnose root causes, stabilize the burn, communicate transparently, deliver visible wins, and re-baseline. Done when status is green for 3 consecutive weekly reports and the sponsor signs the remediation acceptance.

success-criteria.criterion: Root-cause diagnostic complete by end of week 1
Stabilization plan accepted by sponsor by end of week 2
Three consecutive green status reports during the 90-day window
Signed remediation acceptance from the sponsor

stage.name: Diagnose
stage.intent: Find the real root causes, not the symptoms.

tasks.task: Interview core team + key client stakeholders (5-7 conversations)
Map current risk register against actuals
Rank root causes by impact + reversibility

stage.decision-gate: Advance when top 3 root causes are agreed with the delivery lead.

stage.name: Stabilize

tasks.task: Define a 2-week stabilization plan with concrete cut-overs
Get sponsor agreement on scope freezes
Stand up rapid-response triage for crit-path issues

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sponsor has signed; do not move on verbal yes.

stage.name: Re-plan
stage.intent: Build a credible 90-day path back to green.

tasks.task: Re-baseline scope, schedule, budget against the new reality
Apply AI-assisted risk aging to surface near-term threats
Lock weekly traffic-light criteria

stage.decision-gate: Advance when steerco accepts the re-baseline.

stage.name: Execute

tasks.task: Daily 15-min crit-path standup
Weekly demos to sponsor (even if partial)
Track velocity vs plan with public dashboards

stage.decision-gate: Stay in Execute until status has been green for 2 weeks.

stage.name: Re-confirm sentiment
stage.intent: Sponsor confidence is the real metric, not velocity.

tasks.task: 1:1 sentiment check with sponsor + key stakeholders weekly
Surface unmet expectations early
Adjust comms cadence to match anxiety level

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if sentiment trend is upward 3 weeks in a row.

stage.name: Sign-off
stage.intent: Lock the rescue with a written acceptance.

tasks.task: Compile evidence package: diagnostic, plan, results, sentiment
Schedule remediation-acceptance review with sponsor
Obtain signed acceptance + reactivate normal cadence

stage.decision-gate: Done when signed acceptance is on file.

stage.name: Lessons
stage.intent: Make sure the next project does not repeat this one.

tasks.task: Run a no-blame retro with the full team
Update portfolio risk patterns library
Publish lessons-learned to PMO

stage.decision-gate: Done when doc is published and PMO has acknowledged.

extra.value: [Jumping to re-plan before Diagnose finishes -> rescue based on the wrong root cause, Scope unfreezes during Stabilize -> next week is red again, Tracking velocity but ignoring sentiment -> sponsor pulls the contract anyway]
['Could a new PM read the diagnostic and know why we were red?', 'Does the sponsor agree the project feels green, not just the dashboard?', 'Was lessons-learned published so the portfolio benefits?']

{human: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-90-day-turnaround --format md, agent: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-90-day-turnaround --format context, json: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-90-day-turnaround --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
